attacking_style: Opportunistic racer who contests intermediate sprints for time bonuses and tactical pressure, even when not in GC contention. Shows willingness to race aggressively throughout stages rather than wait for finish.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish clear team tactical patterns. Appears to operate with individual freedom in stage races.
terrain_preference: Climbing stages suit him best - demonstrated ability to finish with elite GC climbers like Carapaz. Strong stage race climber as a young rider.
vulnerability: Limited observations prevent definitive weakness identification, though aggressive intermediate sprint contesting suggests possible energy management issues in longer efforts.
key_patterns: Contests intermediate sprints tactically even outside top-10 GC position (2 instances observed)
Finishes with elite GC climber groups on mountain stages showing climbing durability
Races aggressively throughout stages rather than conserving for selective moments
form_trajectory: positive: strong climbing performance staying with Carapaz group, plus tactical aggression at intermediates shows confidence
